The '''Bloodguard''' was a unit of elite [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] within<ref name="Galaxies" /> the radical [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] splinter group<ref name="HotM">{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}</ref> known as the [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]]. Named for the [[Blood/Legends|blood]]-like [[Color/Legends|color]] of their distinctive crimson [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]], the Bloodguard was based out of the [[Death/Legends|Death]] Watch's [[Death Watch bunker|hidden bunker]] on the [[Tree/Legends|forest]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. There, they acted as security for the base. Around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], members of the Bloodguard engaged several [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] who attempted to intrude into the base.<ref name="Galaxies" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Bloodguard first appeared in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in the [[Star Wars video games|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', beginning with its updated release, ''An Empire Divided''.
